scenes.title:
Some questions are
hard to ask out loud.
scenes.subtitle: Here, you can ask them — honestly, and without shame.
scenes.narration: Some questions are hard to ask out loud. About desire. About intimacy. About the parts of being human we're quietly taught to keep to ourselves. This is a place to ask them — honestly, and without shame.

scenes.title:
A calm, clinician-curated
space for honest answers.
scenes.subtitle: Evidence-based help on intimacy, desire and relationships — for adults in India, and the people who care for them.
scenes.narration: This is the Intimacy and Sex Therapy Library. A calm, clinician-curated space for evidence-based answers about intimacy, desire and relationships — written for adults in India, and the people who care for them. Always free. Never judgmental.

scenes.title:
Whatever brought you here,
you're not the only one.
scenes.subtitle: Most adults carry a question about intimacy they've never felt safe enough to ask. That's exactly who this is for.
scenes.narration: And whatever brought you here, you're not the only one. Most adults carry a question about intimacy they've never felt safe enough to ask out loud. That's exactly who this is for.

scenes.title:
What you explore here
stays yours.

cards.heading: No tracking
cards.body: No tracking cookies, no selling your data, no following you around the web.

cards.heading: Encrypted by default
cards.body: Your conversations with our companion are encrypted at rest.

cards.heading: Zero-knowledge Vault
cards.body: Turn on Vault mode and even we cannot read what you write.

scenes.narration: Before anything else, a promise. We don't sell your data, and we don't follow you with tracking cookies. Your conversations are encrypted. And with our zero-knowledge Vault mode, even we cannot read them. What you explore here stays yours.

scenes.title:
A living library,
in plain language.
scenes.subtitle: Articles, books and research on desire, relationships, the asexual spectrum and LGBTQ+ care — with an AI guide that finds trustworthy reading.
scenes.query: How do I talk to my partner about low desire?
scenes.narration: Start with the library — articles, books and research on desire, relationships, the asexual spectrum and LGBTQ-plus care. Search any topic, and an AI guide gathers trustworthy reading for you, all in plain language.

scenes.title:
Not sure where to start?
Follow a path.

cards.heading: Couples reset
cards.body: Rebuild closeness, one honest conversation at a time.

cards.heading: Anxiety & ED
cards.body: Evidence-based steps, minus the panic and the pressure.

cards.heading: Affirming care
cards.body: LGBTQ+ and asexual-inclusive journeys, at your own pace.

scenes.narration: Not sure where to start? Follow a guided path — a couples reset, navigating a sexless marriage, anxiety and erectile concerns, or LGBTQ-plus affirming care. Step by step, and always at your own pace.

scenes.title:
When you'd rather
talk it through.
scenes.subtitle: Warm, India-aware and never judgmental — and always a companion, never a replacement for a clinician.

chat.text: I don't know how to bring this up with my partner.
That takes courage to even name. Let's find words that feel true to you — and I'll point you to a clinician who can help.

scenes.narration: When you'd rather talk it through, there's Sahay — a warm, India-aware companion. She listens without judgment, helps you find the words, and always points you toward real, qualified care. A companion, never a replacement for a clinician.

scenes.title:
Straight answers,
with receipts.
scenes.subtitle: Answers only from the curated, clinician-reviewed library — a citation on every claim. If it doesn't know, it says so.
scenes.answer: Performance anxiety is common and highly treatable. Evidence supports sensate-focus exercises and CBT-based approaches.
scenes.narration: Want a straight answer with receipts? Our cite-everything assistant replies only from the curated, clinician-reviewed library, with a citation on every claim. And if it doesn't know, it tells you — instead of guessing.

scenes.title:
Quietly wondering
where you stand?
scenes.subtitle: Validated tools clinicians use — scored on your device, kept to yourself, and never shared. A gentle reflection helps you make sense of them.
scenes.narration: Quietly wondering where you stand? Take a private self-assessment — the same validated tools clinicians use. Your results are scored on your device, kept to yourself, and never shared. A gentle reflection helps you make sense of them.

scenes.title:
When you're ready
for a human.

cards.heading: Clinicians near you
cards.body: Sex therapists and counsellors, surfaced with care and context.

cards.heading: Affirming spaces
cards.body: LGBTQ+ and asexual-friendly communities — you belong here.

cards.heading: Real options
cards.body: Curated, flagged when needed, and refreshed so they stay trustworthy.

scenes.narration: And when you're ready for a human, the Find Help hub points you to clinicians and communities — including affirming, LGBTQ-plus and asexual-friendly spaces. Real options, chosen with care.

scenes.title:
Replace shame with
calm, sourced truth.
scenes.subtitle: A quick, playful “myth or fact” turns misinformation into understanding — one gentle card at a time.
scenes.mythText: “You should always be in the mood for your partner.”
scenes.factText: Desire naturally ebbs and flows. That's healthy.
scenes.narration: We also make unlearning feel good. A quick, playful myth-or-fact gently replaces shame and misinformation with calm, sourced truth — one card at a time.

scenes.title:
Reviewed by clinicians.
Honest about its limits.
items: Every resource is screened by an advisory board of qualified clinicians before it goes live.
A public model card spells out exactly what our AI can — and cannot — do.
Sources are cited, crisis routing is India-first, and nothing here replaces professional care.
scenes.narration: Everything here is reviewed by an advisory board of qualified clinicians before it goes live. And we're honest about our limits — a public model card spells out exactly what our AI can, and cannot, do.

scenes.title:
This isn't about clicks.
It's about you.
scenes.subtitle: If a moment ever feels heavier than information can hold, we gently route you to crisis support that can help — right now.
scenes.narration: Because this was never about clicks. It's about your wellbeing. If a moment ever feels heavier than information can hold, we route you — gently, and India-first — to crisis support that can help right now.

scenes.title:
No shame. No tracking.
No cost.
scenes.subtitle: Honest, caring help — here whenever you're ready.
scenes.narration: No shame. No tracking. No cost. Just honest, caring help, here whenever you're ready. This is the Intimacy and Sex Therapy Library.
